controls.control_objective: To ensure also be involved in implementation of various forms of debt relief schemes (drs) announced by state governments that inter alia entail sacrifice / wai

of various forms of Debt Relief Schemes (DRS) announced by State Governments that
inter alia entail sacrifice / waiver of debt obligations of a targeted segment of borrowers,
against fiscal support.

controls.control_description:

without due consideration to the principles of financial discipline, they would negatively
affect credit discipline and in the long run, may be counter-productive to the credit flow to
such borrowers.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all restructurings, including those undertaken under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016
controls.control_description:
The provisions of this Chapter shall be applicable to all restructurings, including those
undertaken under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all restructurings, including those undertaken under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately downgraded as non- performing assets, i
controls.control_description:
An account classified as 'standard' shall be immediately downgraded as non-
performing assets, i.e., 'sub-standard' to begin with, following a restructuring by an
AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be immediately downgraded as non- performing assets, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to have the same asset classification as prior to restructuring
controls.control_description:
An account classified as non-performing asset, upon restructuring by an AIFI, shall
continue to have the same asset classification as prior to restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to have the same asset classification as prior to restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the ageing criteria as per extant asset classification norms contained in the reserve bank of india (all india financial in
controls.control_description:
In both above cases, the asset classification shall continue to be governed by the
ageing criteria as per extant asset classification norms contained in the Reserve
Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Income Recognition, Asset
Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the ageing criteria as per extant asset classification norms contained in the reserve bank of india (all india financial in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated by an aifi as standard asset during the monitoring period under the approved resolution plan
controls.control_description:
Any additional finance approved under the resolution plan (including any resolution
plan approved by the Adjudicating Authority under Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code,
2016) may be treated by an AIFI as standard asset during the monitoring period
under the approved resolution plan, provided the account demonstrates satisfactory
performance during the monitoring period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated by an aifi as standard asset during the monitoring period under the approved resolution plan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in the same asset classification category as the restructured debt by an aifi
controls.control_description:
If the restructured asset fails to perform satisfactorily during the monitoring period
or does not qualify for upgradation at the end of the monitoring period, the additional
finance shall be placed in the same asset classification category as the restructured
debt by an AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in the same asset classification category as the restructured debt by an aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as standard asset during the insolvency resolution process period as defined in the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016
controls.control_description:
Any interim finance [as defined in section 5 (15) of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy
Code, 2016] extended by the specified lenders to borrowers undergoing insolvency
<image>
proceedings under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 may be treated as
standard asset during the insolvency resolution process period as defined in the
Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as standard asset during the insolvency resolution process period as defined in the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded only when all the outstanding loan / credit facilities in the account demonstrate 'satisfactory performance' with respect to all the speci
controls.control_description:
Standard accounts classified as non-performing and non-performing accounts
retained in the same category on restructuring by an AIFI may be upgraded only
when all the outstanding loan / credit facilities in the account demonstrate
'satisfactory performance' with respect to all the specified lenders during the
monitoring period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded only when all the outstanding loan / credit facilities in the account demonstrate 'satisfactory performance' with respect to all the speci

controls.control_objective: To ensure the account cannot be upgraded before one year from the commencement of the first payment of interest or principal (whichever is later) on the credit
controls.control_description:
Provided that the account cannot be upgraded before one year from the
commencement of the first payment of interest or principal (whichever is later) on
the credit facility with longest period of moratorium under the terms of RP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the account cannot be upgraded before one year from the commencement of the first payment of interest or principal (whichever is later) on the credit

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be rated as investment grade (bbb- or better), at the time of upgrade, by credit rating agencies accredited by the reserve bank for the purpose o
controls.control_description:
In addition to the requirement in paragraph 55, for accounts where the aggregate
exposure of specified lenders is ₹100 crore and above at the time of implementation
of resolution plan, to qualify for an upgrade, in addition to demonstration of
satisfactory performance, the credit facilities of the borrower shall also be rated as
investment grade (BBB- or better), at the time of upgrade, by credit rating agencies
accredited by the Reserve Bank for the purpose of bank loan ratings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be rated as investment grade (bbb- or better), at the time of upgrade, by credit rating agencies accredited by the reserve bank for the purpose o

controls.control_objective: To ensure require two ratings, those below ₹500 crore shall require one rating
controls.control_description:
Provided that while accounts with aggregate exposure of ₹500 crore and above shall
require two ratings, those below ₹500 crore shall require one rating.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require two ratings, those below ₹500 crore shall require one rating

controls.control_objective: To ensure be investment grade for the account to qualify for an upgrade
controls.control_description:
Provided further that if the ratings are obtained from more than the required number
of credit rating agencies, all such ratings shall be investment grade for the account
to qualify for an upgrade.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be investment grade for the account to qualify for an upgrade

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the normal ratings provided by the credit rating agencies and not independent credit evaluation specified in paragraph 29
controls.control_description:
Explanation: These ratings referred to in the second proviso shall be the normal
ratings provided by the credit rating agencies and not Independent Credit Evaluation
specified in paragraph 29.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the normal ratings provided by the credit rating agencies and not independent credit evaluation specified in paragraph 29

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to implementation of a fresh restructuring / change in ownership under these directions or under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016
controls.control_description:
If a borrower fails to demonstrate satisfactory performance with respect to all the
specified lenders during the monitoring period, asset classification upgrade shall be
subject to implementation of a fresh restructuring / change in ownership under these
Directions or under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to implementation of a fresh restructuring / change in ownership under these directions or under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract provisioning as per the asset classification category as laid out in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income reco
controls.control_description:
An account that has been restructured shall attract provisioning as per the asset
classification category as laid out in the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract provisioning as per the asset classification category as laid out in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income reco

controls.control_objective: To ensure make additional specific provision of 15 per cent for an account referred to in paragraphs 57 and 58 at the end of the review period
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall make additional specific provision of 15 per cent for an account
referred to in paragraphs 57 and 58 at the end of the Review Period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make additional specific provision of 15 per cent for an account referred to in paragraphs 57 and 58 at the end of the review period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed when the accounts are upgraded to standard category
controls.control_description:
Specific provisions held on restructured assets by an AIFI as per paragraph 59
above, may be reversed when the accounts are upgraded to standard category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed when the accounts are upgraded to standard category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed as per the norms laid down in paragraph 47 by an aifi
controls.control_description:
Additional specific provisions as required under paragraph 60, along with other
additional specific provisions, may be reversed as per the norms laid down in
paragraph 47 by an AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed as per the norms laid down in paragraph 47 by an aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 20
controls.control_description:
During the insolvency resolution process period, provisioning for the interim finance
shall be governed by the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions -
Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 20

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the norms applicable to additional finance, as per paragraphs 52 and 53
controls.control_description:
Subsequently, upon approval of the resolution plan by the Adjudicating Authority,
treatment of such interim finance shall be as per the norms applicable to additional
finance, as per paragraphs 52 and 53.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the norms applicable to additional finance, as per paragraphs 52 and 53

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the provisions held as on the date of such submission of rp frozen for a period of six months from the date of submission of the plan or up to 90
controls.control_description:
In respect of accounts of borrowers where a final resolution plan, as approved by
the Committee of Creditors, has been submitted by the Resolution Professional for
approval of the Adjudicating Authority (in terms of section 30(6) of the Insolvency
and Bankruptcy Code, 2016), an AIFI may keep the provisions held as on the date
of such submission of RP frozen for a period of six months from the date of
submission of the plan or up to 90 days from the date of approval of the resolution
plan by the Adjudicating Authority in terms of section 31(1) of the Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Code, 2016, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep the provisions held as on the date of such submission of rp frozen for a period of six months from the date of submission of the plan or up to 90

controls.control_objective: To ensure make additional provisioning to the extent of the shortfall
controls.control_description:
Provided that in cases where the provisioning held is lower than the expected
required provisioning, an AIFI shall make additional provisioning to the extent of the
shortfall.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make additional provisioning to the extent of the shortfall

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available only in cases where the provisioning held by an aifi as on the date of submission of the plan for approval of the adjudicating authority
controls.control_description:
The facility of freezing the quantum of the provision as per paragraph 65 shall be
available only in cases where the provisioning held by an AIFI as on the date of
submission of the plan for approval of the Adjudicating Authority is more than the
expected provisioning required to be held in the normal course upon implementation
of the approved resolution plan, taking into account the contours of the resolution
plan approved by Committee of Creditors / Adjudicating Authority, as the case may
be, and extant prudential norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available only in cases where the provisioning held by an aifi as on the date of submission of the plan for approval of the adjudicating authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure reverse the excess provisions held as on the date of submission of the resolution plan for approval of the adjudicating authority at this stage
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding paragraph 66, an AIFI shall not reverse the excess provisions held
as on the date of submission of the resolution plan for approval of the Adjudicating
Authority at this stage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reverse the excess provisions held as on the date of submission of the resolution plan for approval of the adjudicating authority at this stage

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the requirements in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning)
controls.control_description:
Subsequent to the lapse of the period specified in paragraph 65, provisioning shall
be as per the requirements in the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the requirements in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning)

controls.control_objective: To ensure lapse immediately if the adjudicating authority rejects the resolution plan thus submitted, and asset classification in respect of such borrower shall
controls.control_description:
The facility of freezing of provisions as allowed in paragraph 65 shall lapse
immediately if the Adjudicating Authority rejects the resolution plan thus submitted,
and asset classification in respect of such borrower shall continue be governed by
the extant asset classification norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lapse immediately if the adjudicating authority rejects the resolution plan thus submitted, and asset classification in respect of such borrower shall

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised on cash basis
controls.control_description:
Interest income in respect of restructured accounts classified as 'standard assets'
may be recognized on accrual basis and that in respect of the restructured accounts
classified as 'non-performing assets' shall be recognised on cash basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised on cash basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised only on cash basis by an aifi except when the restructuring is accompanied by a change in ownership
controls.control_description:
In the case of additional finance in accounts where the pre-restructuring facilities
were classified as non-performing assets, the interest income shall be recognised
only on cash basis by an AIFI except when the restructuring is accompanied by a
change in ownership.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised only on cash basis by an aifi except when the restructuring is accompanied by a change in ownership

controls.control_objective: To ensure be continued / upgraded as 'standard' by an aifi after the change in ownership is implemented, either under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016 o
controls.control_description:
In case of change in ownership of the borrowing entities, credit facilities of the
concerned borrowing entities may be continued / upgraded as 'standard' by an AIFI
after the change in ownership is implemented, either under the Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Code, 2016 or under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be continued / upgraded as 'standard' by an aifi after the change in ownership is implemented, either under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016 o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions: (1) the aifi shall conduct necessary due diligence in this regard and clearly establish that the acquirer is n
controls.control_description:
If the change in ownership is implemented under these Directions, then the
classification as 'standard' shall be subject to the following conditions:
(1) The AIFI shall conduct necessary due diligence in this regard and clearly
establish that the acquirer is not a person disqualified in terms of Section
29A of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions: (1) the aifi shall conduct necessary due diligence in this regard and clearly establish that the acquirer is n

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly establish that the 'new promoter' is not a person / entity / subsidiary / associate etc
controls.control_description:
(2) The AIFI shall clearly establish that the 'new promoter' is not a person /
entity / subsidiary / associate etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly establish that the 'new promoter' is not a person / entity / subsidiary / associate etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have acquired at least 26 per cent of the paid-up equity capital as well as voting rights of the borrower entity and shall be the single largest share
controls.control_description:
<image>
(3) The new promoter shall have acquired at least 26 per cent of the paid-up
equity capital as well as voting rights of the borrower entity and shall be the
single largest shareholder of the borrower entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have acquired at least 26 per cent of the paid-up equity capital as well as voting rights of the borrower entity and shall be the single largest share

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in 'control' of the borrower entity as per the definition of 'control' in the companies act, 2013 / regulations issued by the securities and exchan
controls.control_description:
(4) The new promoter shall be in 'control' of the borrower entity as per the
definition of 'control' in the Companies Act, 2013 / regulations issued by the
Securities and Exchange Board of India / any other applicable regulations /
accounting standards, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in 'control' of the borrower entity as per the definition of 'control' in the companies act, 2013 / regulations issued by the securities and exchan

controls.control_objective: To ensure trigger a fresh review period
controls.control_description:
If the account fails to perform satisfactorily at any point of time during the monitoring
period, it shall trigger a fresh Review Period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to trigger a fresh review period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed only after the end of monitoring period subject to satisfactory performance during the same
controls.control_description:
The quantum of provisions held (excluding additional provisions) by the AIFI against
the said account as on the date of change in ownership of the borrowing entities
may be reversed only after the end of monitoring period subject to satisfactory
performance during the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed only after the end of monitoring period subject to satisfactory performance during the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be under lock-in in the hands of the aifi for the remaining lock-in period
controls.control_description:
In case the promoters' shares have been pledged with an AIFI as collateral during
the lock-in period mandated under the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure
Requirements) Regulations, 2018, and the pledge is invoked during the lock-in
period by the AIFI consequent to default by the company, such shares may be
transferred to the AIFI but shall continue to be under lock-in in the hands of the AIFI
for the remaining lock-in period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be under lock-in in the hands of the aifi for the remaining lock-in period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as an event of restructuring for the purpose of asset classification and provisioning in the books of a bank with regard to the residual de
controls.control_description:
A sale and leaseback transaction of the assets of a borrower or other transactions
of similar nature shall be treated as an event of restructuring for the purpose of asset
classification and provisioning in the books of a bank with regard to the residual debt
of the seller as well as the debt of the buyer if all the following conditions are met:
(1) the seller of the assets is in financial difficulty;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as an event of restructuring for the purpose of asset classification and provisioning in the books of a bank with regard to the residual de

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as 'restructuring' by an aifi if the borrower concerned is under financial difficulty
controls.control_description:
or
(2) with the support (where permitted) from the Indian banking system in the
form of Guarantees / Standby Letters of Credit / Letters of Comfort, etc.,
such events shall be treated as 'restructuring' by an AIFI if the borrower concerned
is under financial difficulty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as 'restructuring' by an aifi if the borrower concerned is under financial difficulty

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain ineligible for restructuring
controls.control_description:
Borrowers who have committed frauds/ malfeasance/ wilful default as well as any
entity with which a wilful defaulter is associated shall remain ineligible for
restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain ineligible for restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure take a view on restructuring such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal action against the erstwhile pro
controls.control_description:
However, in cases where the existing promoters are replaced by new promoters
satisfying the conditions specified at sub-paragraphs 73(1) to 73(4), and the borrower
company is totally delinked from such erstwhile promoters / management, an AIFI
may take a view on restructuring such accounts based on their viability, without
prejudice to the continuance of criminal action against the erstwhile promoters /
management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take a view on restructuring such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal action against the erstwhile pro

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from the list of wilful defaulters
controls.control_description:
A wilful defaulter or any entity with which a wilful defaulter is associated shall be
eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from
the List of Wilful Defaulters, subject to penal measures applicable to borrowers
classified as wilful defaulter in terms of the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from the list of wilful defaulters

controls.control_objective: To ensure be to maximise the possible recovery from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the aifi
controls.control_description:
The objective of compromise settlements shall be to maximise the possible recovery
from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be to maximise the possible recovery from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to any mutually agreed contractual provisions between an aifi and a borrower relating to future contingent realizations or recovery by the aifi
controls.control_description:
The compromise settlements and technical write-offs shall be without prejudice to
any mutually agreed contractual provisions between an AIFI and a borrower relating
to future contingent realizations or recovery by the AIFI, subject to such claims not
being recognised in any manner on the balance sheet of the AIFI at the time of the
settlement or subsequently till actual realization of such receivables.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to any mutually agreed contractual provisions between an aifi and a borrower relating to future contingent realizations or recovery by the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring
controls.control_description:
Provided that any such claims recognised on the balance sheet of the AIFI shall
render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as restructuring
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding paragraph 85, compromise settlements where the time for payment
of the agreed settlement amount exceeds three months shall be treated as
restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure also fall under the definition of restructuring, and shall be governed by the provisions applicable thereto
controls.control_description:
Any arrangement involving part settlement with the borrower shall also fall under the
definition of restructuring, and shall be governed by the provisions applicable
thereto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also fall under the definition of restructuring, and shall be governed by the provisions applicable thereto

controls.control_objective: To ensure undermined in any manner
controls.control_description:
However,
such technical write-offs do not entail any waiver of claims against the borrower and
thus the AIFI's right to recovery shall not undermined in any manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undermined in any manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with reference to the original exposure
controls.control_description:
In case of partial technical write-offs, the prudential requirements in respect of
residual exposure, including provisioning and asset classification, shall be with
reference to the original exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with reference to the original exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed on the gross value of the asset
controls.control_description:
Provided that the amount of provision including the amount representing partial
technical write-off shall meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed on
the gross value of the asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed on the gross value of the asset

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs
controls.control_description:
There shall be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a
quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs
approved by a particular authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the board
controls.control_description:
Provided that compromise settlements and technical write-offs approved by the MD
& CEO / Board Level Committee shall be reported to the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate coverage of the following aspects at the minimum: <image> (1) trend in number of accounts
controls.control_description:
The Board shall mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate
coverage of the following aspects at the minimum:
<image>
(1) trend in number of accounts and amounts subjected to compromise
settlement and/or technical write-off (q-o-q and y-o-y);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate coverage of the following aspects at the minimum: <image> (1) trend in number of accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a cooling period as determined by the respective board approved policies before the aifi can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers
controls.control_description:
In respect of borrowers subject to compromise settlements, there shall be a cooling
period as determined by the respective Board approved policies before the AIFI can
assume fresh exposures to such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a cooling period as determined by the respective board approved policies before the aifi can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to a floor of 12 months with an aifi being free to stipulate higher cooling periods in terms of their board approved policies
controls.control_description:
Provided that the cooling period in respect of exposures other than farm credit
exposures shall be subject to a floor of 12 months with an AIFI being free to stipulate
higher cooling periods in terms of their Board approved policies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to a floor of 12 months with an aifi being free to stipulate higher cooling periods in terms of their board approved policies

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined by an aifi as per their respective board approved policies
controls.control_description:
Provided further that the cooling period for farm credit exposures shall be
determined by an AIFI as per their respective Board approved policies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined by an aifi as per their respective board approved policies

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to credit extended to agricultural activities as listed in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income recognition, ass
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Farm credit for the above purpose shall refer to credit extended to
agricultural activities as listed in the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to credit extended to agricultural activities as listed in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income recognition, ass

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the board approved policies of an aifi
controls.control_description:
The cooling period to be adopted in respect of exposures subjected to technical
write-offs shall be as per the Board approved policies of an AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the board approved policies of an aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake compromise settlements or technical write-offs in respect of accounts categorised as wilful defaulters or fraud without prejudice to the cri
controls.control_description:
An AIFI may undertake compromise settlements or technical write-offs in respect of
accounts categorised as wilful defaulters or fraud without prejudice to the criminal
proceeding underway against such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake compromise settlements or technical write-offs in respect of accounts categorised as wilful defaulters or fraud without prejudice to the cri

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be applicable in cases where an aifi enter into compromise settlement with such borrowers, and the cooling periods specified in paragraphs
controls.control_description:
The penal measures applicable to borrowers classified as fraud or wilful defaulter in
terms of the Reserve Bank of India (Fraud Risk Management in Commercial Banks
<image>
(including Regional Rural Banks) and All India Financial Institutions) Directions,
2024 and the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Treatment of
Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025, respectively, shall continue
to be applicable in cases where an AIFI enter into compromise settlement with such
borrowers, and the cooling periods specified in paragraphs 92 and 93, in respect of
such borrowers, shall be without prejudice to such penal measures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be applicable in cases where an aifi enter into compromise settlement with such borrowers, and the cooling periods specified in paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a preferred option
controls.control_description:
As long as larger policy concerns are suitably addressed and the costs of malafide
actions are made to be borne by the perpetrators, early recoveries by an AIFI should
be a preferred option, subject to safeguards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a preferred option

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to the provisions of any other statute in force
controls.control_description:
The compromise settlements with the borrowers under these Directions shall be
without prejudice to the provisions of any other statute in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to the provisions of any other statute in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to obtaining a consent decree from the concerned judicial authorities
controls.control_description:
Wherever an AIFI had commenced recovery proceedings under a judicial forum and
the same is pending before such judicial forum, any settlement arrived at with the
borrower shall be subject to obtaining a consent decree from the concerned judicial
authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to obtaining a consent decree from the concerned judicial authorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in cases of compromise settlements undertaken by an aifi through lok adalats: (1) the monetary ceiling of the cases to be referred to the lok ad
controls.control_description:
In addition to the requirements contained in paragraphs 83 to 97, the following shall
apply in cases of compromise settlements undertaken by an AIFI through Lok
Adalats:
(1) The monetary ceiling of the cases to be referred to the Lok Adalats,
organised by Civil Courts shall be ₹20 lakh.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply in cases of compromise settlements undertaken by an aifi through lok adalats: (1) the monetary ceiling of the cases to be referred to the lok ad

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to projects where financial closure has been achieved as on october 1, 2025, for which the prudential guidelines on project finance prevailing b
controls.control_description:
The instructions contained in paragraphs 101 to 119 shall not apply to projects
where financial closure has been achieved as on October 1, 2025, for which the
prudential guidelines on project finance prevailing before October 1, 2025, which
otherwise shall be treated as repealed, shall apply.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to apply to projects where financial closure has been achieved as on october 1, 2025, for which the prudential guidelines on project finance prevailing b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the guidelines contained in paragraphs 101 to 119
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the instructions in paragraph 99, any resolution of a fresh credit
event and/or change in material terms and conditions in the loan contract in such
projects, on or after October 1, 2025, shall be as per the guidelines contained in
paragraphs 101 to 119.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the guidelines contained in paragraphs 101 to 119

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor the performance of the project and any buildup of stress on an ongoing basis and shall be expected to initiate a resolution plan well in advan
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall monitor the performance of the project and any buildup of stress on an
ongoing basis and shall be expected to initiate a resolution plan well in advance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor the performance of the project and any buildup of stress on an ongoing basis and shall be expected to initiate a resolution plan well in advan

controls.control_objective: To ensure trigger a collective resolution in terms of chapter iii of these directions
controls.control_description:
Occurrence of a credit event with any lender during the construction phase, shall
trigger a collective resolution in terms of Chapter III of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to trigger a collective resolution in terms of chapter iii of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read as 'credit event' for the purpose of project finance accounts
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The reference to 'default' in Chapter III of these Directions shall be read
as 'credit event' for the purpose of project finance accounts, unless specified
otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be read as 'credit event' for the purpose of project finance accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the central repository of information on large credit (crilc) by the aifi in the prescribed weekly as well as the crilc-main report in
controls.control_description:
Any such credit event with an AIFI shall be reported to the Central Repository of
Information on Large Credit (CRILC) by the AIFI in the prescribed weekly as well as
the CRILC-Main report in compliance with paragraphs 15 and 16.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be reported to the central repository of information on large credit (crilc) by the aifi in the prescribed weekly as well as the crilc-main report in

controls.control_objective: To ensure also report occurrence of such credit event to all other members of the consortium / multiple lending arrangement
controls.control_description:
An AIFI, which is part of a consortium / multiple lending arrangement shall also
report occurrence of such credit event to all other members of the consortium /
multiple lending arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also report occurrence of such credit event to all other members of the consortium / multiple lending arrangement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued in due course
controls.control_description:
The instructions on CRILC reporting as per paragraph 103 shall be issued in due
course.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued in due course

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake a prima facie review of the borrower account during the review period
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall undertake a prima facie review of the borrower account during the
Review Period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake a prima facie review of the borrower account during the review period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by chapter iii of these directions
controls.control_description:
The conduct of an AIFI during the Review Period, including signing of Inter Creditor
Agreement (ICA), and the decision to implement a resolution plan, wherever
required, shall be guided by Chapter III of these Directions, unless specified
otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by chapter iii of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be classified as 'standard'
controls.control_description:
If a resolution plan involving extension of original / extended DCCO, as the case
maybe, is implemented in a project finance account, which is classified as Standard
and satisfies all relevant prudential conditions specified for sanction, disbursement
and monitoring of project finance in the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025, the asset classification of such
<image>
account shall continue to be classified as 'Standard', provided the envisaged
resolution plan ab initio conforms to the following conditions:
(1) Permitted DCCO Deferment - Original / extended DCCO, as the case may
be, is extended, along with the consequential shift in repayment schedule
for equal or shorter duration (including the start date and end date of revised
repayment schedule), within the following time limits:
Infrastructure
Non-Infrastructure Projects (including
Projects
CRE and CRE-RH) Permitted deferment of DCCO from the original DCCO
Up to 3 years Up to 2 years
Explanation: For CRE and CRE-RH projects, all provisions of the Real
Estate (Regulation and Development) Act, 2016 (as updated from time to
time) are to be complied with.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be classified as 'standard'

controls.control_objective: To ensure finance, as part of a resolution plan, cost overrun associated with permitted dcco deferment in compliance with sub- paragraph (1) above, and classify the account as 'standard', as under: explanation: for projects where aggregate exposure of all lenders is less than ₹100 crore, internal credit rating may be considered
controls.control_description:
(2) Cost Overrun - An AIFI may finance, as part of a resolution plan, cost
overrun associated with permitted DCCO deferment in compliance with sub-
paragraph (1) above, and classify the account as 'Standard', as under:
Explanation: For projects where aggregate exposure of all lenders is less
than ₹100 crore, internal credit rating may be considered, if the project was
originally not credit rated externally.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to finance, as part of a resolution plan, cost overrun associated with permitted dcco deferment in compliance with sub- paragraph (1) above, and classify the account as 'standard', as under: explanation: for projects where aggregate exposure of all lenders is less than ₹100 crore, internal credit rating may be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as 'standard'
controls.control_description:
(3) Change in Scope and Size - A project finance account where DCCO
extension is necessitated by an increase in the project outlay on account of
increase in scope and size of the project, may be classified as 'Standard',
subject to complying with the following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as 'standard'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed only once during the lifetime of the project
controls.control_description:
The standard asset classification benefit on account of 'change in scope' shall be
allowed only once during the lifetime of the project.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed only once during the lifetime of the project

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to be met in respect of all the lenders before the expiry of 180 days from the end of the review period, for successful implementation of
controls.control_description:
In all the cases specified in paragraph 108, the following conditions shall be required
to be met in respect of all the lenders before the expiry of 180 days from the end of
the Review Period, for successful implementation of a resolution plan:
(1) all required documentation, including execution of necessary agreements
between a lender and the borrower / creation of security charge / perfection
of securities, are completed in consonance with the resolution plan being
implemented;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to be met in respect of all the lenders before the expiry of 180 days from the end of the review period, for successful implementation of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be downgraded to npa immediately
controls.control_description:
If a resolution plan involving change in DCCO is not successfully implemented in
terms of paragraphs 108 and/ or 110, then the account shall be downgraded to NPA
immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be downgraded to npa immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in this case
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Satisfactory performance as defined in paragraph 4(14) shall apply in
this case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply in this case

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded on successful implementation of resolution plan
controls.control_description:
A project finance account downgraded to NPA for non-compliance with paragraph
110, may be upgraded on successful implementation of resolution plan, provided no
further request for deferment of DCCO is received.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded on successful implementation of resolution plan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as follows: (1) an aifi may recognise income on accrual basis in respect of project finance exposures which are classified as 'standard'
controls.control_description:
Income recognition in respect of a project finance account where a resolution plans
involving extension of original / extended DCCO shall be as follows:
(1) An AIFI may recognise income on accrual basis in respect of project finance
exposures which are classified as 'Standard'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as follows: (1) an aifi may recognise income on accrual basis in respect of project finance exposures which are classified as 'standard'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income recognition, asset classification and provisi
controls.control_description:
(2) For NPAs, income recognition shall be as per instructions contained in the
Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Income Recognition,
Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income recognition, asset classification and provisi

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain additional specific provisions of 0
controls.control_description:
For accounts which have availed DCCO deferment as per paragraphs 108 to 111
and are classified as 'standard', an AIFI shall maintain additional specific provisions
of 0.375 per cent for infrastructure project loans and 0.5625 per cent for non-
infrastructure project loans (including CRE and CRE-RH), for each quarter of
deferment, over and above the applicable standard asset provision specified in the
Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Income Recognition, Asset
Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain additional specific provisions of 0

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed upon commencement of commercial operations
controls.control_description:
The additional specific provisions required as per paragraph 115 shall be reversed
upon commencement of commercial operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed upon commencement of commercial operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable for existing projects which are specified in paragraph 99 and such project loans shall continue to be guided by the prudential guideline
controls.control_description:
The provisions stipulated in paragraph 115 shall not be applicable for existing
projects which are specified in paragraph 99 and such project loans shall continue
to be guided by the prudential guidelines for the purpose of provisioning, prevailing
before October 1, 2025, shall apply, which otherwise shall be treated as repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable for existing projects which are specified in paragraph 99 and such project loans shall continue to be guided by the prudential guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to these projects as if these were sanctioned on or after october 1, 2025
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the instructions in paragraph 117, in case of any resolution of a
fresh credit event and / or change in material terms and conditions in the loan
contract in such projects, the provisions stipulated in paragraph 115 shall apply to
these projects as if these were sanctioned on or after October 1, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to these projects as if these were sanctioned on or after october 1, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per extant instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income recognition, asset classification and
controls.control_description:
Provisioning for project loans classified as 'standard' (construction or operational
phase) or NPA shall be as per extant instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of
India (All India Financial Institutions - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per extant instructions contained in the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - income recognition, asset classification and

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to resolution of exposures of borrowers impacted by a natural calamity or, mutatis mutandis, exposures of borrowers impacted by external
controls.control_description:
The instructions contained in this Chapter shall be applicable to resolution of
exposures of borrowers impacted by a natural calamity or, mutatis mutandis,
exposures of borrowers impacted by external events such as riots / disturbances
that result in loss to economic activity (hereinafter collectively referred to as
'calamity'), upon the declaration of such calamity by the Central/ State
Governments (in accordance with the framework placed by the concerned
Government for this purpose).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to resolution of exposures of borrowers impacted by a natural calamity or, mutatis mutandis, exposures of borrowers impacted by external

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to borrower accounts where relief measures have been already provided as on the effective date of these amendment directions, and such accounts
controls.control_description:
These instructions shall not apply to borrower accounts where relief measures
have been already provided as on the effective date of these Amendment
Directions, and such accounts shall continue to be guided by the existing
prudential guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to borrower accounts where relief measures have been already provided as on the effective date of these amendment directions, and such accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the guidelines contained in this chapter
controls.control_description:
However, any fresh resolution in such accounts subsequent
to the effective date of these Amendment Directions shall be as per the guidelines
contained in this Chapter.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the guidelines contained in this chapter

controls.control_objective: To ensure convene a special slbc / utlbc meeting within 15 days of such declaration
controls.control_description:
Upon declaration of a calamity, if a larger part of the State / Union Territory (UT)
has been affected, the SLBC / UTLBC convenor bank shall convene a special
SLBC / UTLBC meeting within 15 days of such declaration.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convene a special slbc / utlbc meeting within 15 days of such declaration

controls.control_objective: To ensure convene the meeting within 15 days of such declaration, after due consultation with the slbc / utlbc convenor bank
controls.control_description:
If the calamity has affected only a part of the State / UT, the convenor of the DCC
of the affected district(s) shall convene the meeting within 15 days of such
declaration, after due consultation with the SLBC / UTLBC convenor bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convene the meeting within 15 days of such declaration, after due consultation with the slbc / utlbc convenor bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assessed in terms of the severity of the impact of the calamity on the economic activity and the need for any resolution measures by the res
controls.control_description:
In the special SLBC / UTLBC / DCC meeting, the position of the affected areas
may be assessed in terms of the severity of the impact of the calamity on the
economic activity and the need for any resolution measures by the REs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assessed in terms of the severity of the impact of the calamity on the economic activity and the need for any resolution measures by the res

controls.control_objective: To ensure also formulate the objective criteria for identifying impacted borrowers, and the extent of moratorium period
controls.control_description:
<image>
UTLBC / DCC may also formulate the objective criteria for identifying impacted
borrowers, and the extent of moratorium period, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also formulate the objective criteria for identifying impacted borrowers, and the extent of moratorium period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conveyed by the slbc / utlbc convenor bank immediately to all slbc / utlbc members along with the minutes of the meeting
controls.control_description:
The decisions taken in the special SLBC / UTLBC meeting(s) as mentioned at
paragraph 119E above, shall be conveyed by the SLBC / UTLBC convenor bank
immediately to all SLBC / UTLBC members along with the minutes of the meeting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conveyed by the slbc / utlbc convenor bank immediately to all slbc / utlbc members along with the minutes of the meeting

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be forwarded by the slbc / utlbc convenor bank to the respective regional office of reserve bank and the non-banking financial companies (nbfcs)
controls.control_description:
A copy of the same shall also be forwarded by the SLBC / UTLBC convenor bank
to the respective Regional Office of Reserve Bank and the Non-Banking Financial
Companies (NBFCs) / Urban Co-operative Banks (UCBs) operating in the area.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be forwarded by the slbc / utlbc convenor bank to the respective regional office of reserve bank and the non-banking financial companies (nbfcs)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conveyed by the dcc convenor bank immediately to the dcc members and the slbc / utlbc along with the minutes of the meeting
controls.control_description:
The decisions taken in the special DCC meeting(s) shall be conveyed by the DCC
convenor bank immediately to the DCC members and the SLBC / UTLBC along
with the minutes of the meeting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conveyed by the dcc convenor bank immediately to the dcc members and the slbc / utlbc along with the minutes of the meeting

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be forwarded by the dcc convenor bank to the respective regional office of reserve bank and the nbfcs / ucbs operating in the area
controls.control_description:
A copy of the same shall also be forwarded by
the DCC convenor bank to the respective Regional Office of Reserve Bank and
the NBFCs / UCBs operating in the area.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be forwarded by the dcc convenor bank to the respective regional office of reserve bank and the nbfcs / ucbs operating in the area

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given adequate publicity by slbcs / utlbc / dccs / aifi through various methods such as brochures, banners, advertisement in newspapers, visits by
controls.control_description:
The decisions taken in the special SLBC / UTLBC / DCC meeting(s) shall be given
adequate publicity by SLBCs / UTLBC / DCCs / AIFI through various methods
such as brochures, banners, advertisement in newspapers, visits by field staff,
and other suitable modes, for the benefit of affected borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given adequate publicity by slbcs / utlbc / dccs / aifi through various methods such as brochures, banners, advertisement in newspapers, visits by

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, recommends extending relief measures to the impacted borrowers, aifi may implement resolution plans in respect of impacted borrowers subject to th
controls.control_description:
Where the SLBC/ UTLBC/ DCC, as the case may be, recommends extending relief
measures to the impacted borrowers, AIFI may implement resolution plans in
respect of impacted borrowers subject to the provisions of this Chapter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, recommends extending relief measures to the impacted borrowers, aifi may implement resolution plans in respect of impacted borrowers subject to th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as the date of occurrence
controls.control_description:
Explanation: In case no specific date of occurrence is ascertainable in respect of
a calamity, the date of declaration of such calamity by the Central / State
Governments shall be treated as the date of occurrence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as the date of occurrence

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be considered for resolution under other provisions of these directions
controls.control_description:
Borrowers, whose loan accounts do not fulfil the required eligibility conditions for
resolution under this Chapter may continue to be considered for resolution under
other provisions of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be considered for resolution under other provisions of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the refinance portfolio of an aifi
controls.control_description: The provisions of this Chapter shall not apply to the refinance portfolio of an AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the refinance portfolio of an aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for resolution under this chapter whose accounts are classified as 'standard', but which are not in default for more than 30 days with the
controls.control_description:
Those borrowers shall be eligible for resolution under this Chapter whose accounts
are classified as 'Standard', but which are not in default for more than 30 days
with the AIFI in respect of any of their facilities, as on the date of occurrence of
the calamity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for resolution under this chapter whose accounts are classified as 'standard', but which are not in default for more than 30 days with the

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide on participating in a particular drs notified by a government, based on its board approved policy
controls.control_description:
An AIFI may decide on participating in a particular DRS notified by a Government,
based on its Board approved policy, subject to the extant regulatory norms.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to decide on participating in a particular drs notified by a government, based on its board approved policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure warrant modification in long term interest of the borrowers or for prudential reasons may be duly brought to the notice of the concerned authority/ies
controls.control_description:
Any provision of the scheme that may warrant modification in long term interest of
the borrowers or for prudential reasons may be duly brought to the notice of the
concerned authority/ies through the State Level Bankers' Committee / District level
Consultative Committee, during the consultation phase while designing the DRS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to warrant modification in long term interest of the borrowers or for prudential reasons may be duly brought to the notice of the concerned authority/ies

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly determine the eventual outstanding that may crystallise in their books in respect of the borrowers proposed to be covered under the drs, inclu
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall clearly determine the eventual outstanding that may crystallise in their
books in respect of the borrowers proposed to be covered under the DRS, including
the accumulated interest in non-performing accounts, by the time the dues are
settled under the DRS, to enable the Government to suitably arrange for the extent
of fiscal participation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly determine the eventual outstanding that may crystallise in their books in respect of the borrowers proposed to be covered under the drs, inclu

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the borrowers to be covered under drs are selected strictly as per terms of such schemes so as to avoid subsequent non-admission by the au
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall ensure that the borrowers to be covered under DRS are selected
strictly as per terms of such schemes so as to avoid subsequent non-admission by
the authorities on technical grounds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the borrowers to be covered under drs are selected strictly as per terms of such schemes so as to avoid subsequent non-admission by the au

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly communicated to the borrowers at the time of obtaining explicit consent from the borrower for availing benefits under a proposed drs
controls.control_description:
The terms and conditions of the scheme as well as the prudential aspects, including
cooling period for extending fresh credit, impact on credit score etc., shall be clearly
communicated to the borrowers at the time of obtaining explicit consent from the
borrower for availing benefits under a proposed DRS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly communicated to the borrowers at the time of obtaining explicit consent from the borrower for availing benefits under a proposed drs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a compromise settlement and shall attract the prudential treatment contained in paragraphs 83 to 98
controls.control_description:
Any waiver of accrued but unrealised interest and/ or sacrifice of principal
undertaken by an AIFI in the borrower accounts of beneficiaries of the DRS, either
as part of the implementation of the scheme or subsequent to its implementation,
shall be treated as a compromise settlement and shall attract the prudential
treatment contained in paragraphs 83 to 98.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a compromise settlement and shall attract the prudential treatment contained in paragraphs 83 to 98

controls.control_objective: To ensure lead to extinguishment of borrower's debt obligations
controls.control_description:
If the funds received by an AIFI as part of the DRS covers the entire outstanding
dues of the borrower, including principal and interest accrued till the date of receipt
of funds by the AIFI, the same shall lead to extinguishment of borrower's debt
obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lead to extinguishment of borrower's debt obligations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be evaluated as per the terms and conditions of the original loan contract
controls.control_description:
In cases where the funds received by an AIFI as part of the scheme are not adequate
to cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrower, leading to residual exposure
(principal and / or accrued interest), the asset classification of the residual exposure
shall be evaluated as per the terms and conditions of the original loan contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be evaluated as per the terms and conditions of the original loan contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure be evaluated against the test of restructuring as defined in these directions and shall attract the prudential treatment therein
controls.control_description:
Provided that any changes / modifications to the terms and conditions of the original
loan contract in such cases shall be evaluated against the test of restructuring as
defined in these Directions and shall attract the prudential treatment therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be evaluated against the test of restructuring as defined in these directions and shall attract the prudential treatment therein

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the commercial discretion of the aifi under relevant internal policy
controls.control_description:
Any fresh credit exposure to such borrowers shall be as per the commercial
discretion of the AIFI under relevant internal policy, subject to extant applicable
regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the commercial discretion of the aifi under relevant internal policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the extant guidelines in this regard
controls.control_description:
An AIFI's reporting in respect of the borrowers under the scheme to the credit
information companies shall be guided by the extant guidelines in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided by the extant guidelines in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be creation of any receivable against the government on account of the drs and the exposure shall continue to be on the borrower till receipt of funds
controls.control_description:
There shall not be creation of any receivable against the Government on account of
the DRS and the exposure shall continue to be on the borrower till receipt of funds
by the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be creation of any receivable against the government on account of the drs and the exposure shall continue to be on the borrower till receipt of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to apply the prudential norms including prudential norms on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning, and wherever the accou
controls.control_description:
Till receipt of funds, an AIFI shall continue to apply the prudential norms including
prudential norms on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning, and
wherever the accounts are non-performing, the AIFI may pursue recovery measures
as per their Board approved policy against such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to apply the prudential norms including prudential norms on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning, and wherever the accou

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in respect of drs notified on or after december 31, 2024 and shall be without prejudice to the instructions on resolution of stressed assets con
controls.control_description:
The instructions contained in paragraphs 120 to 131 shall apply in respect of DRS
notified on or after December 31, 2024 and shall be without prejudice to the
instructions on resolution of stressed assets contained in these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply in respect of drs notified on or after december 31, 2024 and shall be without prejudice to the instructions on resolution of stressed assets con

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract specific provision of 100 per cent
controls.control_description:
In respect of relief measures announced prior to December 31, 2024, any dues
pending receipt from Government, for more than 90 days shall attract specific
provision of 100 per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract specific provision of 100 per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure take necessary action and actively follow up with the respective governments for settlement of dues referred to in paragraph 134
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall take necessary action and actively follow up with the respective
Governments for settlement of dues referred to in paragraph 134.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take necessary action and actively follow up with the respective governments for settlement of dues referred to in paragraph 134

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to cases where an act of restructuring creates new securities issued by the borrower which would be held by an aifi in lieu of a portion
controls.control_description:
Paragraphs 136 to 138 shall be applicable to cases where an act of restructuring
creates new securities issued by the borrower which would be held by an AIFI in
lieu of a portion of the pre-restructured exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to cases where an act of restructuring creates new securities issued by the borrower which would be held by an aifi in lieu of a portion

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in the same asset classification category by an aifi in which the restructured advance has been classified
controls.control_description:
The Funded Interest Term Loan (FITL) / debt / equity instruments created by
conversion of principal / unpaid interest, as the case may be, shall be placed in the
same asset classification category by an AIFI in which the restructured advance has
been classified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in the same asset classification category by an aifi in which the restructured advance has been classified

controls.control_description:
Equity instruments, where classified as standard, shall be valued at market value, if

Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025, subject to the following
modifications:

interest rate charged to the borrower on the residual debt after restructuring

controls.control_description:

(1) The average of the weekly high and low of the volume weighted average
price of the related equity shares quoted on the recognised stock exchange

weekly high and low of the volume weighted average prices of the related
